'''todhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azotemic|azotemic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azotemic|azotemic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| todhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || todhachithi || todhachiji || todhachishi || todhachiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || todhachuthu || todhachuju || todhachushu || todhachuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || todhachuthu || todhachuju || todhachushu || todhachuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || todhachufthuf || todhachufjuf || todhachufshuf || todhachufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || todhachethe || todhacheje || todhacheshe || todhacheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || todhachotho || todhachojo || todhachosho || todhachoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || todhachotho || todhachojo || todhachosho || todhachoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || todhachofthof || todhachofjof || todhachofshof || todhachofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || todhachïfthïf || todhachïfjïf || todhachïfshïf || todhachïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || todhachïfthïf || todhachïfjïf || todhachïfshïf || todhachïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || todhachïfthïf || todhachïfjïf || todhachïfshïf || todhachïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || todhachïfthïf || todhachïfjïf || todhachïfshïf || todhachïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || todhachæthæ || todhachæjæ || todhachæshæ || todhachækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || todhachatha || todhachaja || todhachasha || todhachaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || todhachatha || todhachaja || todhachasha || todhachaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || todhachafthaf || todhachafjaf || todhachafshaf || todhachafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || todhachasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || todhachshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || todhachroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || todhachmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || todhachyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotodhachnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotodhachnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotodhachnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotodhachnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || todhadhachasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || todhadhachshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || todhadhachroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || todhadhachmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || todhadhachyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotodhadhachnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotodhadhachnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotodhadhachnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotodhadhachnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || tedhæchasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || tedhæchshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || tedhæchroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || tedhæchmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || tedhæchyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotedhæchnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotedhæchnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotedhæchnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotedhæchnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || todhfachasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || todhfachshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || todhfachroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || todhfachmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || todhfachyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotodhfachnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotodhfachnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotodhfachnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotodhfachnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
